description_long: This sculpture depicts a detailed human figure, possibly a deity or mythological character, standing on a circular base. The figure is adorned with intricate garments and jewelry, and is posed with one arm raised, holding an object or interacting with an overhead arch or decorative element. The surface of the sculpture is weathered, with visible textural details and some areas of erosion or damage, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with rougher, unfinished surfaces and some hollowed or broken sections. The overall coloration is a mix of dark green and brown, giving the appearance of aged bronze or stone with moss or patina. The base is broad and stable, supporting the upright figure and decorative elements above.
description: A weathered, intricately detailed human figure sculpture with raised arm and ornate attire, standing on a circular base with decorative elements. The surface shows signs of age, with green and brown hues suggesting patinated bronze or stone.
description_view_0: The side view reveals the figure's profile, showing the raised arm and the detailed drapery of the attire, with the circular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: The rear view exposes the rough, unfinished back of the sculpture, with visible hollowed and damaged areas, and less ornamental detail.
description_view_2: This angled side view highlights the curvature of the figure and the arching decorative element above, with the base and some surface erosion visible.
description_view_3: The front view displays the full figure, ornate attire, raised arm, and the most detailed decorative elements, making it the most visually engaging perspective.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with ornate attire and decorative arch
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the background is isolated and does not indicate a particular setting.
